title: Hornet Removal in Seaford, NY | $350 – $550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Seaford, Long Island. Fast, safe hornet nest elimination. Pricing $350 – $550. Licensed experts serving Seaford homes and businesses.
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets around your Seaford property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast and effective hornet removal services throughout this Long Island community. Our experienced technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from residential and commercial properties in Seaford, protecting your family, customers, and pets from dangerous stings.
whyUs: With years of experience serving Long Island communities like Seaford, Best Pest Control NYC combines local expertise with proven hornet removal techniques. Our licensed professionals use safe, effective methods to remove hornet nests and prevent future infestations, all at transparent prices ranging from $350 to $550 depending on nest size and location.
localContext: Seaford's tree-lined neighborhoods, proximity to Seaford Creek, and mix of Cape Cod and ranch-style homes create ideal nesting spots for hornets in eaves, trees, and shed areas. From properties near Tackapausha Preserve to homes along Merrick Road, we've helped countless Seaford residents reclaim their yards from these aggressive stinging insects.

faqs.question: How much does hornet removal cost in Seaford?
faqs.answer: Hornet removal services in Seaford typically range from $350 to $550, depending on the nest size, location, and accessibility. Ground nests or easily accessible areas are usually on the lower end, while high nests in trees or soffits may cost more due to equipment needs and safety precautions.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Seaford?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day or next-day service for most Seaford hornet removal requests. Once on-site, the removal process typically takes 30 minutes to an hour, depending on nest size and location. We understand hornets pose immediate danger, so we prioritize emergency calls.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Yes, our hornet removal methods prioritize safety for your family and pets. We use EPA-approved treatments and professional-grade protective equipment. We'll advise you to keep children and pets indoors during treatment, and the area is typically safe within a few hours after service completion.

faqs.question: What's the difference between hornets, wasps, and yellow jackets?
faqs.answer: Hornets are larger than yellow jackets and most wasps, with bald-faced hornets being common in Seaford. Hornets build large, paper-like nests often in trees or under eaves, while yellow jackets frequently nest underground. All can be aggressive when defending nests, but hornets are generally more defensive and their stings more painful, making professional removal essential.
